caption: Figure 1: Fusion architectures. (A) Early Fusion MLP (8.8M params). (B) Cross-Attention (1.8M params). (C) Bilinear Fusion (0.54M params). (D) Gated Fusion (3.2M params). See Section 3 for details.
description2: The figure presents four fusion architectures: Early Fusion MLP, Cross-Attention, Bilinear Fusion, and Gated Fusion, each with a specified number of parameters.
description3: Four-panel plot displays four fusion architectures, labeled early fusion, cross-attention, bilinear fusion, and gated fusion, with varying parameter counts.
questions: What architectural designs are presented for data fusion?
How do the parameter counts differ among the fusion designs?
